insight: On 1.20.5+, serialized item NBT only stores component overrides/additions, not defaults. So `NBT.getComponents(item, comp -> comp.hasTag("minecraft:X"))` reliably detects non-vanilla components without comparing to a fresh vanilla item. Gate component checks behind `MinecraftVersion.atLeast(V.v1_21)` since Foundation's enum can't distinguish 1.20.4 from 1.20.5.
